title: Verify AGV Operating Characteristics And Safety Context From Training Material
summary: Use the training material to verify documented AGV operating characteristics relevant to movement guidance and safety context. This runbook is limited to confirming what the training source states: AGVs operate over QR codes, are directly controlled by Geek+ RMS, Geek+ handles movement and route determination, AGVs have forward collision sensors, and this version is intended to operate in a fenced system.
when_to_use: Use when you need to confirm the AGV operating characteristics and safety-related context exactly as documented in the supplied training material, especially for reference, documentation verification, or training review.
not_for: Do not use this runbook to infer additional safety procedures, controls, or behaviors not explicitly stated in the training source.
Do not use this runbook as a field troubleshooting or corrective-action procedure.
Do not use the fenced-system statement alone to derive undocumented safety rules.

roles_and_responsibilities.responsibility: Review the training artifact and verify the documented AGV characteristics exactly as stated in the source.

safety_notes: This runbook is reference-only and does not authorize system changes or guarded-area actions.
The source states this AGV version is intended to operate in a fenced system.
Do not infer additional safety procedures from the fenced-system statement alone.
Escalate if observed field behavior appears inconsistent with the documented training description, because the source is a high-level training segment only.
access_or_tools_needed: Access to the training slide or artifact
Ability to review AGV training content

access_required: Access to the training slide or artifact
system_preconditions: Relevant AGV training content is available for review.

visual_references.description: Training slide and discussion frame listing AGV operating characteristics, RMS responsibilities, forward collision sensors, and fenced-system intent.

steps.title: Review the AGV training slide
steps.purpose: Locate the source material that documents the AGV operating characteristics to be verified.
steps.instruction: Open and review the training slide or artifact covering automated guided vehicles and Geek+ RMS responsibilities.
steps.expected_result: The relevant training slide or frame is available for review.
steps.healthy_condition: The artifact clearly shows the AGV characteristic statements referenced by the training material.
steps.failure_condition: The relevant training slide or frame cannot be accessed or does not show the expected AGV characteristic content.

actions.label: Open training artifact
actions.exact_action: Review the training slide or artifact covering automated guided vehicles.

screens_or_images.what_to_look_at: Slide text and discussion describing AGV operating characteristics and Geek+ RMS responsibilities.

stop_or_escalate_if: The artifact does not contain the AGV characteristic statements needed for verification.

source_evidence.quote_or_summary: Training slide and discussion frame explaining how Geek+ automated guided vehicles are controlled by the Geek+ RMS and what functions reside on the AGV versus in the management system.

steps.title: Confirm QR-code operation
steps.purpose: Verify the documented navigation basis stated in the training source.
steps.instruction: Confirm that the training material states the AGVs operate over QR codes.
steps.expected_result: The AGV navigation characteristic is verified exactly as documented.
steps.healthy_condition: The source explicitly states that Geek+ AGVs operate over QR codes.
steps.failure_condition: The source does not show or clearly support the QR-code operation statement.

actions.label: Verify QR-code statement
actions.exact_action: Confirm that the AGVs are described as operating over QR codes.

screens_or_images.what_to_look_at: Text stating that Geek+ AGVs operate over QR codes.

stop_or_escalate_if: The QR-code operation statement cannot be found in the supplied source.

source_evidence.quote_or_summary: Slide text states that Geek+ AGVs operate over QR codes, are directly controlled by Geek+ RMS, Geek+ handles all movement, the system determines the best route from point A to point B, the AGVs have forward collision sensors, and this version is intended to operate in a fenced system.

steps.title: Confirm RMS direct control and movement responsibility
steps.purpose: Verify the documented control architecture and movement responsibility described in the training source.
steps.instruction: Confirm that the training material states the AGVs are directly controlled by Geek+ RMS and that Geek+ handles all movement. Also verify that the system determines the best route from point A to point B when that statement is present in the same source content.
steps.expected_result: The RMS control and movement responsibility statements are verified exactly as documented.
steps.healthy_condition: The source explicitly states that AGVs are directly controlled by Geek+ RMS, Geek+ handles all movement, and the system determines the best route from point A to point B.
steps.failure_condition: The source does not clearly support one or more of the RMS control or movement statements.

actions.label: Verify RMS control statement
actions.exact_action: Confirm that the AGVs are described as directly controlled by Geek+ RMS and that Geek+ handles all movement.

screens_or_images.what_to_look_at: Text describing direct Geek+ RMS control, movement handling, and route determination.

stop_or_escalate_if: The source wording about RMS control or movement responsibility is unclear.
Observed field behavior appears inconsistent with the documented training description.

source_evidence.quote_or_summary: Slide text states that Geek+ AGVs operate over QR codes, are directly controlled by Geek+ RMS, Geek+ handles all movement, the system determines the best route from point A to point B, the AGVs have forward collision sensors, and this version is intended to operate in a fenced system.

Geek+ AGVs operate over QR codes and are directly controlled by Geek+ RMS. RMS handles all movement, determines the best route from point A to point B, and serves as the robot management system external to the AGV.

steps.title: Confirm forward collision sensors
steps.purpose: Verify the documented safety-related AGV characteristic stated in the training source.
steps.instruction: Check that the training slide states the AGVs have forward collision sensors.
steps.expected_result: The forward collision sensor statement is verified exactly as documented.
steps.healthy_condition: The source explicitly states that the AGVs have forward collision sensors.
steps.failure_condition: The source does not show or clearly support the forward collision sensor statement.

actions.label: Verify forward collision sensors
actions.exact_action: Check that the slide states the AGVs have forward collision sensors.

stop_or_escalate_if: The forward collision sensor statement cannot be confirmed from the supplied source.

Slide text indicates Geek+ AGVs operate over QR codes, are directly controlled by Geek+ RMS, Geek+ handles all movement, determines the best route from point A to point B, and the AGVs have forward collision sensors.
These AGVs have forward collision sensors, and this version is intended to operate in a fenced system.

steps.title: Confirm fenced-system intent
steps.purpose: Verify the documented operating context statement related to the AGV version.
steps.instruction: Check that the training slide states this AGV version is intended to operate in a fenced system.
steps.expected_result: The fenced-system statement is verified exactly as documented.

steps.title: Record the verified characteristics exactly as documented
steps.purpose: Preserve the verified source statements without adding unsupported interpretation.
steps.instruction: Record the verified operating characteristics exactly as documented in the training source without adding undocumented safety rules, behaviors, commands, or controls.
steps.expected_result: A source-faithful record of the AGV operating characteristics is produced.
steps.healthy_condition: The recorded characteristics match the source wording and remain limited to documented statements.
steps.failure_condition: The recorded notes add unsupported interpretation, extra safety rules, or undocumented AGV behaviors.

actions.label: Document verified statements
actions.exact_action: Record the verified operating characteristics exactly as documented without adding undocumented safety rules or behaviors.

screens_or_images.what_to_look_at: The full set of AGV characteristic statements to be transcribed accurately.

stop_or_escalate_if: There is uncertainty about whether a statement is explicitly supported by the source.
Observed field behavior appears inconsistent with the documented training description, because the source is a high-level training segment only.

source_evidence.quote_or_summary: Slide text states that Geek+ AGVs operate over QR codes, are directly controlled by Geek+ RMS, Geek+ handles all movement, the system determines the best route from point A to point B, the AGVs have forward collision sensors, and this version is intended to operate in a fenced system.

success_criteria: The training source has been reviewed.

The following characteristics are verified from the source: AGVs operate over QR codes; AGVs are directly controlled by Geek+ RMS; Geek+ handles all movement; the system determines the best route from point A to point B; AGVs have forward collision sensors; this version is intended to operate in a fenced system.
The verified characteristics are recorded exactly as documented without unsupported additions.
healthy_conditions: The source explicitly supports each recorded AGV characteristic.
The verification remains limited to source-documented operating and safety context statements.
The artifact used for verification is the training frame associated with the cited segment.
failure_conditions: The required training artifact cannot be accessed.
One or more AGV characteristic statements cannot be confirmed from the supplied source.
Recorded notes include unsupported interpretation or undocumented safety rules.
Observed field behavior appears inconsistent with the documented training description.
escalation_guidance: Escalate if field behavior appears inconsistent with the documented training description, because the source is a high-level training segment only.
Escalate if any required AGV characteristic cannot be confirmed from the supplied source artifact.
Escalate for SME review if additional safety procedures or operational controls are needed beyond what this training source states.

screens_or_images.what_to_look_at: Primary training slide/frame containing the AGV operating characteristics and safety context statements.

source_refs.quote_or_summary: Slide text states that Geek+ AGVs operate over QR codes, are directly controlled by Geek+ RMS, Geek+ handles all movement, the system determines the best route from point A to point B, the AGVs have forward collision sensors, and this version is intended to operate in a fenced system.

missing_details: The source does not provide an estimated completion time.

The source does not provide commands, system paths, or corrective actions.
